description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style yellow metal container with a visibly weathered and scratched surface, indicating extensive outdoor use. The object features a prominent black metal reinforcement running lengthwise along the top and sides, likely serving as both a structural support and a closure mechanism. The yellow paint is chipped and worn, revealing patches of bare metal and rust, especially along the edges and corners. A small, white label with text is affixed to one end, adding to its utilitarian appearance. The container appears to have a hinged lid, as suggested by the seam and the central reinforcement bar, and is likely used for storage or transport of tools or materials. Its robust construction and distressed finish suggest it is designed for heavy-duty urban or industrial environments.
description: A weathered yellow metal container with a black central reinforcement bar, chipped paint, and a small label, showing signs of heavy urban or industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black central reinforcement bar, latch detail, and a small white label on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive paint wear and rust, with the black reinforcement visible along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the black bar and latch but no visible label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing heavy surface wear and the black reinforcement bar.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal reinforcement bar along top and sides
attribute_labeling_or_markings: small white label with text on front right
